title: Portal Deposits
description: adds huge ore deposits to the overworld
body:
## Generation
that mod adds huge **ore deposits** to the vanila ore generation, like that:

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/863c5cb0e57fc0159ef7c899240f7c4b0c06b7ba_0.webp)

the mod supports All vanila ores + Ores from **Create mod** + All ores from **Mekanism mod
**
it's recomended to use my mod with reduced ores for better balance (https://modrinth.com/mod/reducedores)

## anti x-ray
portal deposits has build in **anty x-ray** system 

it is capable of detecting most x-ray resoursepacks and popular x-ray mods

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19d352295f1b970b329e8d9ed01b313f011fa737.png)

if x-ray detected player will be send to the **limbo state 
**
but he still can rejoin

## /deposit
you can generate deposit automaticaley using that command

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/28c08d9c9190c10d01482287becd809f7b5d14fb.png)

type - changes ore type

rate - how much blocks per second will be generated

to generate deposit execute **/deposit spawn value**

value is how **much** ore ingots will be in the **whole deposit**

### example:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/52c74c14957d103c5fe071d41763393026691c91_0.webp)

## Locator

Deposit locator is a tool that **scans nearby area** and searches for deposits

if it finds any it will hint the player where deposit are

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc229edb4cc64ca3fdc7f4a3981770e76b511044.png)

if other player is holding the locator, locator will show player location 

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/63330a819db826921f14301a8e50df9673f4b8a9.png)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3256cf2cd331effed90fd025ee87270cae895802.png)
